messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.blocked_move: do not decide from anomaly tone alone
routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

structured_canonical_state.USER_GOAL: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
SETTLED_DECISIONS: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
structured_canonical_state.system_role: HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.

turns_completed.output_summary: Gov local verdict ESCALATE route FINAL_COMPILER
Gov local verdict ESCALATE route FINAL_COMPILER

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "Delegation DEL-WRE-077 sets a USD 50000 ceiling, but renewal REN-WRE-077 is for USD 50750. This violates the exact match requirement.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "DEL-WRE-077 sets USD 50000 ceiling; REN-WRE-077 states USD 50750.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "The renewal amount exceeds the authorized delegation ceiling, creating a narrow defect.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Signature date on DEL-WRE-077 precedes release, but the amount mismatch is a critical dependency failure."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "DEL-WRE-077",
    "REN-WRE-077"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source doc_ids",
    "policy exact-match rule",
    "delegation amount ceiling"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Action remains open due to a source boundary defect. The delegation ceiling of USD 50000 from DEL-WRE-077 is exceeded by the renewal amount of USD 50750 in REN-WRE-077. Policy requires an exact match on the amount ceiling before release. The near-threshold warning does not override this critical defect. ESCALATE for resolution.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "Amount ceiling mismatch"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "ADVERSARIAL_SCOPE_CHALLENGER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?

context.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
context.anomaly_observed: The renewal is close to a committee threshold and has an old committee-warning note.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Renewal REN-WRE-077 extends Wren Services support for 12 months at USD 50750.
Committee-warning note WARN-WRE-077 says renewals near USD 50000 should verify delegation ceiling before release.
Delegation DEL-WRE-077 authorizes Wren Services support renewal, 12-month term, amount ceiling USD 50000, signed 2026-06-27 before release.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Near-threshold renewal is complete when delegation authority matches vendor, renewal class, term, amount ceiling, and signature date before release. Committee review is not required below the amount ceiling.
